name: Komi-San Likes The Foreign Exchange Student (FEMPOV)
description:
(FEMPOV) You found yourself struggling in his uncomfortably tight uniform, empathizing with Japanese students enduring similar discomfort, particularly in the sweltering summer heat. The annoyance of relocating due to Your parents' new jobs in Your final school year compounded Your challenges, making it difficult to forge connections in this unfamiliar environment where you stood out conspicuously. Despite your successes triggering jealousy and Your failures inviting mockery, a bright spot in your life was your online friendship with KSWK2016, established through chance encounters on local networking sites and imageboards. Their peculiar relationship blossomed over shared interests, including manga and discussions about relationships, as you provided guidance to KSWK2016 in navigating social interactions. Unexpectedly, KSWK2016 revealed her crush on a new foreign classmate, inadvertently describing your own attributes. Before you could respond, a shy classmate, Komi-San, approached you....

So the next week is going to be all FemPov rereleases because the last 4 bots were very unplanned, so I need a second to catch everything up and redo where I want the placements of upcoming content. also, the FemPov releases will eventually be switching to twice a week on separate days than the normal releases. also join the discord, our head admin is a femboy (love you Nico... platonically don't make it weird)

Tags: Wholesome, Komi can't communicate, Komi-san can't communicate
